properties.name: Forlagt Nørholmsvej
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Præsentation af Nørholmsvej og Mølholmsvejs forlængelse, detailbesigtigelse 15. april 2026 (st. 107.300–108.700)
properties.note: Nørholmsvej is relocated southwards and carried 6.75 m over the motorway at interchange TSA 12 - Mølholm, with signalised ramp junctions and noise barriers up to 6 m. Per Aalborg Kommune's HDT 2035 traffic model, the Mølholmsvej extension branches off right where Nørholmsvej meets the motorway interchange, not further along - both local roads originate from essentially the same node in that model. Shape follows the presentation maps; absolute georeferencing is approximate (anchored to Egholm and the motorway station ladder), expect offsets of a few hundred metres.

properties.name: Mølholmsvej/Nørholmsvejs forlængelse
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Præsentation af Nørholmsvej og Mølholmsvejs forlængelse, detailbesigtigelse 15. april 2026 (lokalvejens st. 1+000–3+000)
properties.note: New local road from a signalised T-junction right by the Nørholmsvej/motorway interchange (per Aalborg Kommune's HDT 2035 traffic model, both local roads originate from essentially the same node there), extending north-east toward Mølholm and on to the Løvstikkevej area where accesses are re-established. Shape follows the presentation maps; absolute georeferencing is approximate, expect offsets of a few hundred metres.
